valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Tue 21 Apr 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Wed 22 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Low west Trafalgar 1000 expected just west of FitzRoy 982 by 1800 Tuesday. New low expected east FitzRoy 1002 by same time. High east of Iceland 1039 dissipating
